Efficacy Charts:

Testing exCross.adl:
With CMSOD
CLA ./cms_opendata_ttbar.root CMSOD -i exCross.adl -e 1000 -v 500
/home/runner/work/CutLang/CutLang/CLA/CLA.exe /home/runner/work/CutLang/CutLang/runs/cms_opendata_ttbar.root -inp CMSOD -BP 1 -EVT 1000 -V 500 -ST 0 -S 0 w
					 --> Overall efficiency	 =   96.8 % +-   1.42 %
With ATLASOD
CLA ./atla_opendata_had_ttbar.root ATLASOD -i exCross.adl -e 1000 -v 500
/home/runner/work/CutLang/CutLang/CLA/CLA.exe /home/runner/work/CutLang/CutLang/runs/atla_opendata_had_ttbar.root -inp ATLASOD -BP 1 -EVT 1000 -V 500 -ST 0 -S 0 w
					 --> Overall efficiency	 =    100 % +-      0 %
With DELPHES
CLA ./delphes_events_ttbar.root DELPHES -i exCross.adl -e 1000 -v 500
/home/runner/work/CutLang/CutLang/CLA/CLA.exe /home/runner/work/CutLang/CutLang/runs/delphes_events_ttbar.root -inp DELPHES -BP 1 -EVT 1000 -V 500 -ST 0 -S 0 w
With CMSOD
python3 CLA.py ./cms_opendata_ttbar.root CMSOD -i exCross.adl -e 1000 -v 500
					 --> Overall efficiency	 =   96.8 % +-   1.42 %
hadd Target file: ./histoOut-exCross.adl.root
hadd Target path: ./histoOut-exCross.adl.root:/
hadd Target path: ./histoOut-exCross.adl.root:/test
/home/runner/work/CutLang/CutLang/CLA/CLA.exe ./cms_opendata_ttbar.root -inp CMSOD -BP 1 -EVT 1000 -V 500 -ST 0 -HLT 
With ATLASOD
python3 CLA.py ./atla_opendata_had_ttbar.root ATLASOD -i exCross.adl -e 1000 -v 500
					 --> Overall efficiency	 =    100 % +-      0 %
hadd Target file: ./histoOut-exCross.adl.root
hadd Target path: ./histoOut-exCross.adl.root:/
hadd Target path: ./histoOut-exCross.adl.root:/test
/home/runner/work/CutLang/CutLang/CLA/CLA.exe ./atla_opendata_had_ttbar.root -inp ATLASOD -BP 1 -EVT 1000 -V 500 -ST 0 -HLT 
With DELPHES
python3 CLA.py ./delphes_events_ttbar.root DELPHES -i exCross.adl -e 1000 -v 500
					 --> Overall efficiency	 =   32.6 % +-   2.21 %
hadd Target file: ./histoOut-exCross.adl.root
hadd Target path: ./histoOut-exCross.adl.root:/
